title: ANC - Transparency mode behavior during the call
scenario: Transparency Mode in Device Settings > ANC tab is not greyed out and remains selectable during an active call on ANC-supported devices
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected ANC-supported device name to open Device Settings.
3. Tap on the ANC tab within Device Settings.
4. Verify that the Transparency Mode option is displayed.
5. Place an active call using the connected device (e.g., dial a number or receive an incoming call).
6. While on the active call, return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → ANC tab.
8. Attempt to tap/select the Transparency Mode option.
expected: The Transparency Mode option should be greyed out and non-selectable while on a call. If the user taps it, a pop-up dialog should appear stating \"This settings cannot be adjusted while on a call\" with an \"Ok\" button. Tapping Ok dismisses the dialog.
